name: Marisa Kirisame
_design_notes: Inspired by Marisa's Imperishable Night (TH8) Stage 4B-style fight - feel-based, not a frame-perfect port.

Phase flow: opening aimed pressure -> Magic Sign "Milky Way" -> nonspell -> Starlight Typhoon-style (aimed + spark beams + optional laser wheel) -> late nonspell -> Love Sign "Master Spark" -> Final Sign "Double Spark".
Patterns favor AIMED, LASER_BEAM, and AIMED_RING (fan + ring) toward the nearest living player (co-op).
LASER_ROTATING: bidirectional beams, one burst in the Typhoon phase for a laser-wheel moment.
LASER: wide aimed beam (Master Spark). GOLD / STAR / RICE / SPARK / ORB as usual.

reimu.speaker: BOSS
reimu.text: Yo, Reimu. I borrowed the good stuff first, try and take it back, ze!

reimu.speaker: PLAYER
reimu.text: Return it now, Marisa. If not, I'll exterminate first and ask later.

reimu.speaker: BOSS
reimu.text: Ha! Try exterminating after you survive this star shower, ze!

marisa.speaker: BOSS
marisa.text: Hold up, another me? Then let's settle who's the real ordinary magician!

marisa.speaker: PLAYER
marisa.text: Fine by me. Winner keeps the title and the Master Spark bragging rights!

marisa.speaker: BOSS
marisa.text: Guess that means two Master Sparks, let's see whose is brighter, ze!

sakuya.speaker: BOSS
sakuya.text: Oh hey, Sakuya. Tell Patchy I'll return those books... eventually.

sakuya.speaker: PLAYER
sakuya.text: Lady Patchouli sent me for them now. If needed, by force.

sakuya.speaker: BOSS
sakuya.text: Knives versus lasers, bring it, I'll return the favor with interest!

sanae.speaker: BOSS
sanae.text: Moriya's wind priestess, huh? Looking for faith points in a duel?

sanae.speaker: PLAYER
sanae.text: Exactly. Beating you should make for excellent shrine publicity.

sanae.speaker: BOSS
sanae.text: Great headline, hope your dodging keeps up with the front page, ze!

cirno.speaker: BOSS
cirno.text: Cirno?! Alright, strongest fairy, try dodging my stars!

cirno.speaker: PLAYER
cirno.text: I'll freeze your magic and prove who's strongest!

cirno.speaker: BOSS
cirno.text: Ice versus stars, let's see which one shatters first!

victoryDialog: Not bad at all. Next time I'll bring an even bigger spark, ze!
defeatDialog: Heh, stars don't lie. Come back after more practice.

victoryDialogByCharacter.reimu: You got me this round, Reimu. Don't get lazy just because you won.
victoryDialogByCharacter.marisa: What?! I lost to... me? Fine, you can borrow the title for now.
victoryDialogByCharacter.sakuya: Ow, those knives are no joke. Tell Patchy I still owe her... maybe.
victoryDialogByCharacter.sanae: Okay, miracle girl, that was flashy. I admit it, you earned that win.
victoryDialogByCharacter.cirno: Whoa, the strongest really did it. Remind me not to underestimate fairies.

defeatDialogByCharacter.reimu: That all you've got, shrine maiden? I expected cleaner dodging.
defeatDialogByCharacter.marisa: Fake or not, I'm still the one and only ordinary magician!
defeatDialogByCharacter.sakuya: Too slow, maid. Time waits for no one, especially not you.
defeatDialogByCharacter.sanae: Common sense from outside won't save you here, ze!
defeatDialogByCharacter.cirno: Even the strongest needs better footing. Try again, Cirno.

phases._note: TH8-style opening: aimed gold streams + one layered fan/ring + light rice wall.
Magic Sign "Milky Way" (TH8): orbit + dense aimed streams, spark columns, one fan+ring layer; minimal pure rings.
Mid nonspell: sustained aimed pressure + one Milky Way-style layer + light spiral.
Starlight Typhoon-inspired (TH8 feel): aimed streams + spark beams; one rotating laser burst; sparse ring.
Late nonspell: fast aimed clusters + fan+ring.
Love Sign "Master Spark": IN-style one main wide LASER with star/aimed support - one LASER_BEAM gust before the beam, then bullet pressure (no second overlapping spark column).
Final Sign "Double Spark" (TH8-style finale): spread sparks + aimed + beams; one ring curtain.
